auth.label: Auth Token
auth.description: MetatextAI auth token used with the Authorization: Bearer <token> header for guard-api requests. Create or copy it from the MetatextAI console API/auth token settings documented in the official API reference: https://docs.metatext.ai/introduction.

extraFields.label: Application ID
extraFields.description: MetatextAI application identifier used in application-scoped guardrails endpoints. Use an existing application ID from your MetatextAI console before connecting this provider.

actions.name: create_policy
actions.description: Create one guardrail policy for the connected MetatextAI application.

type.description: Policy type identifier accepted by MetatextAI.

items.description: Policy target checked by MetatextAI guardrails.

target.description: Application message targets checked by this policy.

rule.description: Policy rule payload accepted by MetatextAI. Keep nested fields flexible because rule shape varies by policy type.

inputSchema.description: Input for creating one MetatextAI policy.

policy.description: A MetatextAI policy object returned by the guard API.

actions.name: evaluate
actions.description: Evaluate one chat transcript against the connected MetatextAI application's configured guardrails.

role.description: Message role accepted by MetatextAI evaluation.

items.description: A chat message submitted to MetatextAI evaluation.

policyIds.description: Optional policy identifiers to evaluate explicitly.

failFast.description: Whether MetatextAI should stop at the first violation.

correctionEnabled.description: Whether MetatextAI should return a corrected output when a violation is found.

overrideResponse.description: Optional fixed response string returned instead of the blocked model output.

inputSchema.description: Input for running a MetatextAI guardrails evaluation.

result.description: The raw MetatextAI evaluate response payload.

actions.name: list_policies
actions.description: List all guardrail policies configured for the connected MetatextAI application.

inputSchema.description: This action does not require any input parameters.

items.description: A MetatextAI policy object returned by the guard API.

outputSchema.description: The policies returned by MetatextAI for the current application.

actions.name: run_test_scan
actions.description: Run a MetatextAI red-team test scan for the connected application with the selected probes.

probes.description: Probe identifiers to run in the red-team scan.

inputSchema.description: Input for triggering a MetatextAI red-team scan.

result.description: The raw MetatextAI red-team scan response payload.

outputSchema.description: The red-team scan response returned by MetatextAI.
